1. allow; 2. let; (proposition) 1. to, 2. by or being in a passive voice
part of the name of some of the roles in traditional Chinese opera
"go in"; to enter (often used to welcome someone to enter a place)
to give something to others; to have something done to oneself by others [colloquial]
as far as sth is concerned

suffix of a noun of locality
